Description.Name: Omen
Description.Details:
The Omen is a Clan assault BattleMech that was created by Clan Snow Raven in the post-Jihad era. The design first began production in 3087, and saw deployment by 3088. The Omen was conceived as a means to bolster the Clan's touman, which was depleted of BattleMech ranks among its second-line combat units. The 'Mech saw production at the Clan's controlled world of Dante, where it could keep Clan technology from falling to its less trusted Outworlds Alliance compatriots. Designed as an all-purpose combat unit, the Omen is considered to be slower than the typical late thirty-first century Clan Assault BattleMech. However, its well-rounded weaponry and its 16.5 tons of standard armor allows it to be durable in combat. Also to help with its lack of speed, the Omen has been given three jump jets, which allow the 'Mech to tactically position itself up to 90 meters in the air and effectively use its weapons. The 'Mech's main ranged weaponry includes a side torso–mounted Remer Series Alpha Deuce 12-tubed advanced tactical missile launcher with a 3 tons of ammunition. Also included in its long-range arsenal is a single Type KOV Class 10 LB X autocannon, found in the 'Mech's right arm. The autocannon is allotted 3 tons of ammunition, which gives it sufficient flexibility for any type of loads the MechWarrior wishes to carry. For its intermediate and close ranges, the 'Mech has been fitted with a single Kolibri Delta Series large pulse laser and paired 14a medium pulse lasers and Series 2d extended range medium lasers. A head-mounted 'Goalkeeper' anti-missile system provides some protective fire from inbound missiles. A MechWarrior must be cautious with weapons fire and equipment heat load, due to the Omen only being fitted with 18 Double Heat Sinks.

S-class mechs feature upgrades to their armour, thermal management and defensive systems that substantially improve their survivability on the 31st century battlefield.

YangsThoughts: Heavy armor and good weapons loadout, the only thing you can really complain about is it's a bit slow, but with this much firepower that's not a huge problem.
